title: 4 Pack Plastic Sieves Multi Purpose Small Mesh Scoop Sieve Strainer Food Kitchen Easy to Use and Clean
description: Fine Mesh Strainer- Professional Quality, High Quality Plastic, No Rust, Non-Toxic and Stylish Design. a Refined Mesh That Will Ensure Only the Finest Grains of Flour Get Through While Ensuring No Lumps. Different Purpose Use- the Strainers Will Be an Everyday Homemade Tool That Will Help You Serve Up Delightful Treats. You Can Also Sift Powdered Sugar & Flour for Superior Baking and Cooking Preparation. Ideal for Straining Broth, Gravy, Sauces, Pastas, Jams, Draining Tea, Cocktails, Almond Milk, Quinoa, Grains Etc. Easy Storage- the Robust Frame Has Two Over Hanging Hooks That Allow You to Place the Sieve Over a Bowl or Pan, Convenient Double Handle That Provides a Secure Grip High Quality Food- Grade Material and Cleaning Tip - the Premium Quality Food Strainer & Sieve Is Crafted from Food-Grade Material, Please Rest Assured Use. Dishwasher Safe, Very Easy to Hand Clean. Wash in Warm Soapy Water Is Okey.
